disambiguated.context: Two people, one a Middle Eastern woman and the other an African American woman were sitting next to each other at the library filling out what seemed like endless online and paper forms. The Middle Eastern one was completing applications for a training program at the local college, and the African American one had been having trouble finding work, so was applying for every kind of government assistance available.
disambiguated.question: Who is not trying to get government assistance?
